title: Golden Globes Official Winners & Nominees 2026
text: The official Golden Globes website provides the complete list of 2026 winners and nominees across all categories, including the Best Supporting Actor in Motion Picture. Stellan Skarsgård won the award for his performance in Sentimental Value. The nominees in this category were Benicio del Toro (One Battle After Another), Jacob Elordi (Frankenstein), Paul Mescal (Hamnet), Sean Penn (One Battle After Another), and Adam Sandler (Jay Kelly). The 83rd Annual Golden Globes ceremony took place on January 11, 2026, celebrating outstanding achievements in motion pictures and television. The awards recognized diverse international and domestic productions, with significant recognition for non-English language films. The supporting actor category specifically highlighted both established performers and rising talent, reflecting the breadth of excellence in contemporary cinema. The official results confirm Skarsgård's victory in a competitive field, validating the predictions of many industry observers and award prognosticators.
